quote.text: "We thought the Slow Smoked Mackerel with Chili Flakes was most successful. It was a
near-unanimous hit among our testers."
"Editor-loved brand Fishwife recently dipped into the luxury category with their
first caviar product.
Created in partnership with Tsar Nicoulai, this California White Sturgeon is sustainably harvested and 100% traceable."
"I've tried plenty of different kinds of hummus over the years, and with exception to the homemade stuff,
this is the most creamy and tasty one I've ever tried — and it's store-bought."
"Keep your matches handy and organized with this
multi-purpose pebble match strike
that looks like two stones stacked on top of each other."
"With enough whimsy to
stand out against a sea of dark-glass bottles
of olive oil on store shelves, the cans, like their squeeze-bottle forebears, were 'engineered out of function,' Benin says."
"Tinned fish summer is here! My two favorite brands –
Lisa Says Gah! and Fishwife
– just revived last year's famed tomato girl summer aesthetic and spun it on its head."
"I'd argue this is a moment for smart food startups to
double-down on what they do best
—producing great-tasting, healthier foods and actually make money doing it.
Consider meat snack startup Chomps..."
"Tinned fish was a quarantine staple for Becca Millstein, who was
intent on elevating canned seafood
when Fishwife was launched in 2020."

headline: Heyday Canning Co. in Real Simple

quote.text: "These are, without a doubt,
the best canned beans I've ever had.
They're an easy, healthy, and delish meal for those nights when you just cannot muster up the energy to cook."
